messages.content: I want to do a proper audit of the Coherence of Aporia repo. I think something got dropped in the force-push restructure.

Found it. There are two diverged checkouts of the same repo:

- theke/ekphrasis/echos/ — the Obsidian Longform vault, HEAD at b600797, the force-push restructure
- theke/ekphrasis/philosophy/ — the old chapter-folder structure, HEAD at 25de9db, now orphaned

The echos restructure consolidated meta files but dropped approximately 22 files totaling around 4,000 lines that only exist in the philosophy checkout:

Critical missing files: STRUCTURE-V2.md (186 lines, the actual book structure with mesh diagram), PROOF.md (631 lines, the formal proof), ABSTRACTION-MESH.md (141 lines), three style guide files totaling about 650 lines, five research thread files around 1,000 lines, process and project status docs, two observation files, and three chapter drafts including a full version of The Hand Remembers that was a 2-line stub in echos.

This is the single source of truth problem. The echos vault is canonical for your Obsidian workflow, but it's missing the philosophical backbone of the project.
What do we keep and what do we drop?

I've done the full assessment.

Merge into echos: PROOF.md — this is the skeleton, keep it. STRUCTURE-V2.md with the 12-chapter mesh structure. STRUCTURE-META.md for the book-as-mesh principle. TITLE.md with the layer test analysis. PROCESS.md as the session log and creative decisions record. ORIGIN.md as the seed document. READING-LIST.md, WRITING-STYLE.md, YOUR-TOPOLOGY.md, COGNITIVE-OBSERVATION.md. The Hand Remembers full draft (96 lines vs the 2-line stub in echos). foundations-draft.md.

Drop: FREEWRITE-INTEGRATION.md (explicitly marked superseded). BOOX-WORKFLOW.md (operational, references old paths). DRAFT-STRUCTURE.md (superseded by STRUCTURE-V2). PROJECT-STATUS.md (stale, PROCESS.md covers it). PUBLISHING-GUIDE.md (redundant with echos PUBLISHING.md). BOOK-WRITING-TECHNICALS.md (generic advice). perplexity-validation.md (already in PROOF.md). craft/identity/poetry-journal-threads.md (initial brainstorm, chapters have moved past it). how-to-research.md (generic methodology).

I'll merge everything now. The old philosophy checkout gets trashed after we verify the merge. The stale copy at agents/demiurge/writing/philosophy gets archived.
Do it. What about the structure mismatch — Longform Index has 28 scenes but STRUCTURE-V2 defines 12 chapters.

That's yours to decide. The 28 scenes in the Longform Index are the original brainstorm list. STRUCTURE-V2 is the more recent, deliberately structured architecture — 12 chapters in 6 parts with the mesh diagram. They're not reconcilable without you making a call on what the book is.

My read: STRUCTURE-V2 is the intellectual architecture. The scenes list is a generative brainstorm. If you're writing the book STRUCTURE-V2 describes, the scenes list is a resource, not the structure. But you might find scenes in the list that don't have a home in STRUCTURE-V2's chapters, which would tell you something.

I've flagged it in the Longform Index as an open question. The merge is complete and verified. Single source of truth: theke/ekphrasis/echos/.

facts: There are two diverged checkouts of the Coherence of Aporia repo: theke/ekphrasis/echos/ at HEAD b600797 and theke/ekphrasis/philosophy/ at HEAD 25de9db
The echos restructure dropped approximately 22 files totaling around 4,000 lines that only exist in the philosophy checkout
PROOF.md is 631 lines and contains the formal proof framework
STRUCTURE-V2.md is 186 lines and contains the 12-chapter mesh structure
The Hand Remembers chapter draft is 96 lines in philosophy but was a 2-line stub in echos
The Obsidian Longform Index lists 28 scenes while STRUCTURE-V2 defines 12 chapters in 6 parts
After the merge, the single source of truth is theke/ekphrasis/echos/
The old philosophy checkout was trashed after the verified merge
The stale copy at agents/demiurge/writing/philosophy was archived
decisions: Merge critical files from philosophy checkout into echos vault and trash the orphaned philosophy checkout
The Longform Index vs STRUCTURE-V2 structural mismatch is deferred as Alice's decision on what the book structure is
contradictions: Obsidian Longform Index lists 28 scenes as the book structure versus STRUCTURE-V2 which defines 12 chapters in 6 parts — these are not reconcilable without a decision on which is canonical

metadata.notes: Sourced from demiurge/memory/2026-02-07.md — Coherence of Aporia repo reconciliation
